lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਕਤਿ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਠਾਕ ਨ ਅਵਘਟ ਘਾਟ ॥੨੩੧॥
lines.translit: mukat padaarath paaeeai tthaak na avaghatt ghaatt |231|
lines.english: He obtains the treasure of liberation, and the difficult road to the Lord is not blocked. ||231||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਨੑਿ ਉਠਾਈ ਪੋਟਲੀ ਕਿਥੈ ਵੰਞਾ ਘਤਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bana utthaaee pottalee kithai vanyaa ghat |2|
lines.english: I am so accustomed to walking in the ways of the world. I have tied and picked up the bundle; where can I go to throw it away? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬੀਰ ਏਕ ਘੜੀ ਆਧੀ ਘਰੀ ਆਧੀ ਹੂੰ ਤੇ ਆਧ ॥
lines.translit: kabeer ek gharree aadhee gharee aadhee hoon te aadh |
lines.english: Kabeer, whether is is for an hour, half an hour, or half of that,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬੀਰ ਭਾਂਗ ਮਾਛੁਲੀ ਸੁਰਾ ਪਾਨਿ ਜੋ ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਾਨੀ ਖਾਂਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: kabeer bhaang maachhulee suraa paan jo jo praanee khaanhi |
lines.english: Kabeer, those mortals who consume marijuana, fish and wine

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਨ ਸੇਤੀ ਗੋਸਟੇ ਜੋ ਕੀਨੇ ਸੋ ਲਾਭ ॥੨੩੨॥
lines.translit: bhagatan setee gosatte jo keene so laabh |232|
lines.english: whatever it is, it is worthwhile to speak with the Holy. ||232||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਰਥ ਬਰਤ ਨੇਮ ਕੀਏ ਤੇ ਸਭੈ ਰਸਾਤਲਿ ਜਾਂਹਿ ॥੨੩੩॥
lines.translit: teerath barat nem kee te sabhai rasaatal jaanhi |233|
lines.english: - no matter what pilgrimages, fasts and rituals they follow, they will all go to hell. ||233||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਰਸ ਖੇਲਉ ਪੀਅ ਸਉ ਕਿਸੀ ਲਖਾਵਉ ਨਾਹਿ ॥੨੩੪॥
lines.translit: sabh ras khelau peea sau kisee lakhaavau naeh |234|
lines.english: I enjoy all pleasures with my Beloved, but I do not let anyone else know. ||234||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੀਚੇ ਲੋਇਨ ਕਰਿ ਰਹਉ ਲੇ ਸਾਜਨ ਘਟ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: neeche loein kar rhau le saajan ghatt maeh |
lines.english: Kabeer, I keep my eyes lowered, and enshrine my Friend within my heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੀਚੇ ਲੋਇਨ ਕਿਉ ਕਰਉ ਸਭ ਘਟ ਦੇਖਉ ਪੀਉ ॥੨੩੫॥
lines.translit: neeche loein kiau krau sabh ghatt dekhau peeo |235|
lines.english: Why should I keep my eyes lowered? I see my Beloved in every heart. ||235||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਜਾਮ ਚਉਸਠਿ ਘਰੀ ਤੁਅ ਨਿਰਖਤ ਰਹੈ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: aatth jaam chausatth gharee tua nirakhat rahai jeeo |
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, every hour, my soul continues to look to You, O Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪੀਉ ਬੂਝਉ ਨਹੀ ਘਟ ਮਹਿ ਜੀਉ ਕਿ ਪੀਉ ॥੨੩੬॥
lines.translit: jeeo peeo boojhau nahee ghatt meh jeeo ki peeo |236|
lines.english: I realize that there is no difference between my soul and my Beloved; I cannot tell whether my soul or my Beloved dwells in my heart. ||236||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਨੁ ਸਖੀ ਪੀਅ ਮਹਿ ਜੀਉ ਬਸੈ ਜੀਅ ਮਹਿ ਬਸੈ ਕਿ ਪੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: sun sakhee peea meh jeeo basai jeea meh basai ki peeo |
lines.english: Listen, O my companions: my soul dwells in my Beloved, and my Beloved dwells in my soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਰਝਿ ਉਰਝਿ ਕੈ ਪਚਿ ਮੂਆ ਚਾਰਉ ਬੇਦਹੁ ਮਾਹਿ ॥੨੩੭॥
lines.translit: arajh urajh kai pach mooaa chaarau bedahu maeh |237|
lines.english: He rots and dies in the perplexities of the four Vedas. ||237||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬੀਰ ਬਾਮਨੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਹੈ ਜਗਤ ਕਾ ਭਗਤਨ ਕਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: kabeer baaman guroo hai jagat kaa bhagatan kaa gur naeh |
lines.english: Kabeer, the Brahmin may be the guru of the world, but he is not the Guru of the devotees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਕਬੀਰ ਗੁਰਿ ਭਲੀ ਬੁਝਾਈ ਕੀਟੀ ਹੋਇ ਕੈ ਖਾਇ ॥੨੩੮॥
lines.translit: keh kabeer gur bhalee bujhaaee keettee hoe kai khaae |238|
lines.english: Says Kabeer, the Guru has given me this sublime understanding: become an ant, and feed on it. ||238||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹੈ ਖਾਂਡੁ ਰੇਤੁ ਮਹਿ ਬਿਖਰੀ ਹਾਥੀ ਚੁਨੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har hai khaandd ret meh bikharee haathee chunee na jaae |
lines.english: The Lord is like sugar, scattered in the sand; the elephant cannot pick it up.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬੀਰ ਜਉ ਤੁਹਿ ਸਾਧ ਪਿਰੰਮ ਕੀ ਸੀਸੁ ਕਾਟਿ ਕਰਿ ਗੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: kabeer jau tuhi saadh piram kee sees kaatt kar goe |
lines.english: Kabeer, if you desire to play the game of love with the Lord, then cut off your head, and make it into a ball.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੇਲਤ ਖੇਲਤ ਹਾਲ ਕਰਿ ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਹੋਇ ਤ ਹੋਇ ॥੨੩੯॥
lines.translit: khelat khelat haal kar jo kichh hoe ta hoe |239|
lines.english: Lose yourself in the play of it, and then whatever will be, will be. ||239||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬੀਰ ਜਉ ਤੁਹਿ ਸਾਧ ਪਿਰੰਮ ਕੀ ਪਾਕੇ ਸੇਤੀ ਖੇਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: kabeer jau tuhi saadh piram kee paake setee khel |
lines.english: Kabeer, if you desire to play the game of love with the Lord, play it with someone with committment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਢੂੰਢਤ ਡੋਲਹਿ ਅੰਧ ਗਤਿ ਅਰੁ ਚੀਨਤ ਨਾਹੀ ਸੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: dtoondtat ddoleh andh gat ar cheenat naahee sant |
lines.english: Searching, the mortal stumbles like a blind person, and does not recognize the Saint.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਚੀ ਸਰਸਉਂ ਪੇਲਿ ਕੈ ਨਾ ਖਲਿ ਭਈ ਨ ਤੇਲੁ ॥੨੪੦॥
lines.translit: kaachee sarsaun pel kai naa khal bhee na tel |240|
lines.english: Pressing the unripe mustard seeds produces neither oil nor flour. ||240||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੋ ਹੀਰਾ ਛਾਡਿ ਕੈ ਕਰਹਿ ਆਨ ਕੀ ਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: har so heeraa chhaadd kai kareh aan kee aas |
lines.english: Forsaking the Diamond of the Lord, the mortals put their hopes in another.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਨਾਮਾ ਕਿਉ ਪਾਈਐ ਬਿਨੁ ਭਗਤਹੁ ਭਗਵੰਤੁ ॥੨੪੧॥
lines.translit: keh naamaa kiau paaeeai bin bhagatahu bhagavant |241|
lines.english: Says Naam Dayv, how can one obtain the Lord God, without His devotee? ||241||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬੀਰ ਜਉ ਗ੍ਰਿਹੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਤ ਧਰਮੁ ਕਰੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਤ ਕਰੁ ਬੈਰਾਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: kabeer jau grihu kareh ta dharam kar naahee ta kar bairaag |
lines.english: Kabeer, if you live the householder's life, then practice righteousness; otherwise, you might as well retire from the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇ ਨਰ ਦੋਜਕ ਜਾਹਿਗੇ ਸਤਿ ਭਾਖੈ ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ॥੨੪੨॥
lines.translit: te nar dojak jaahige sat bhaakhai ravidaas |242|
lines.english: Those people shall go to hell; Ravi Daas speaks the Truth. ||242||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਬੰਧਨੁ ਕਰੈ ਤਾ ਕੋ ਬਡੋ ਅਭਾਗੁ ॥੨੪੩॥
lines.translit: bairaagee bandhan karai taa ko baddo abhaag |243|
lines.english: If someone renounces the world, and then gets involved in worldly entanglements, he shall suffer terrible misfortune. ||243||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਸੇਖ ਫਰੀਦ ਕੇ ॥
lines.translit: salok sekh fareed ke |
lines.english: Saloks Of Shaykh Fareed Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲਕੁ ਜਿ ਕੰਨੀ ਸੁਣੀਦਾ ਮੁਹੁ ਦੇਖਾਲੇ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: malak ji kanee suneedaa muhu dekhaale aae |
lines.english: On that day, the Messenger of Death, of whom she had only heard, comes and shows its face.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਦਿਹਾੜੈ ਧਨ ਵਰੀ ਸਾਹੇ ਲਏ ਲਿਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jit dihaarrai dhan varee saahe le likhaae |
lines.english: The day of the bride's wedding is pre-ordained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿੰਦੁ ਨਿਮਾਣੀ ਕਢੀਐ ਹਡਾ ਕੂ ਕੜਕਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jind nimaanee kadteeai haddaa koo karrakaae |
lines.english: It breaks the bones of the body and pulls the helpless soul out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿੰਦੁ ਵਹੁਟੀ ਮਰਣੁ ਵਰੁ ਲੈ ਜਾਸੀ ਪਰਣਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jind vahuttee maran var lai jaasee paranaae |
lines.english: The soul is the bride, and death is the groom. He will marry her and take her away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹੇ ਲਿਖੇ ਨ ਚਲਨੀ ਜਿੰਦੂ ਕੂੰ ਸਮਝਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: saahe likhe na chalanee jindoo koon samajhaae |
lines.english: That pre-ordained time of marriage cannot be avoided. Explain this to your soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਲਹੁ ਨਿਕੀ ਪੁਰਸਲਾਤ ਕੰਨੀ ਨ ਸੁਣੀ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: vaalahu nikee purasalaat kanee na sunee aae |
lines.english: The bridge to hell is narrower than a hair; haven't you heard of it with your ears?

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣ ਹਥੀ ਜੋਲਿ ਕੈ ਕੈ ਗਲਿ ਲਗੈ ਧਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aapan hathee jol kai kai gal lagai dhaae |
lines.english: After the body sends her away with its own hands, whose neck will it embrace?

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਰੀਦਾ ਦਰ ਦਰਵੇਸੀ ਗਾਖੜੀ ਚਲਾਂ ਦੁਨੀਆਂ ਭਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: fareedaa dar daravesee gaakharree chalaan duneean bhat |
lines.english: Fareed, it is so difficult to become a humble Saint at the Lord's Door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਰੀਦਾ ਕਿੜੀ ਪਵੰਦੀਈ ਖੜਾ ਨ ਆਪੁ ਮੁਹਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: fareedaa kirree pavandeeee kharraa na aap muhaae |1|
lines.english: Fareed, the call has come; be careful now - don't let yourself be robbed. ||1||
